name: Cut The Birch
short_description: Take on the role of a hero whose main task is to cut down birch trees and destroy enemies. Use an axe and magic to do this. Acquire items and improve skills.
detailed_description:
About The Game

In game your main goal is to collect birch and earning xp to level up your hero.

Ways to upgrade your hero

  • Skill tree

  • Upgrading Items

  • Gaining level

  • Skills to your axe

  • Magic spells

Hero base

Hero base is main place to upgrade your stats and gear. Here you can talk with some NPC and restore all of your stats.

Forest

Main place where you gather birch and fight some of enemies. Probably here you will spend most of your time.

Dungeons

Game have few dungeons. Main goal of this dungeons is to get player better items. Every dungeon on the end have a boss fight.

Join discord server to help improving game and talk with our community. Every one can suggest changes or new content to the game! In discord I post more information about the future of the game!
